sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85301" key="polu/rrombos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολύ-ρρομβος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n85301.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with many turns,</tr_> of a bandage, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg003:23" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Fasc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">23</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg003:57" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">57</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
